theme: Archetype 5: Jewel & Luxury (Modified for Dark Editorial Elegance)
mood: Cinematic, extremely elegant, luxury fashion campaign, Apple-level minimalism, deeply emotional.

spacing_and_layout.strategy: Cinematic whitespace, generous padding, bento grid for details, full-screen immersive sections.

components.buttons: Minimalist outline or soft solid with primary color. Rounded-none or extreme subtle rounding (rounded-sm). 1px border. Fluid hover transitions.
components.cards: Cardless or pure glassmorphism. Use 1px border-white/10 for definition. Generous internal padding (p-8 to p-12).
components.inputs: Shadcn UI Input customized: stark minimal dark mode styling, subtle border, no default Vercel glow.
components.navigation: Transparent floating navigation with Crystal Glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/40) on scroll. 1px border-white/10 on the bottom.

motion.scroll: Lenis for smooth, momentum-based scrolling. Mandatory for premium feel.
motion.animations: Framer motion for subtle staggered fade-ins (translate-y-4 to 0). Slow transitions (0.6s to 1s ease-out). Very subtle parallax on hero image.

media.treatment: Soft grain texture overlay globally (pointer-events-none opacity-[0.03]). Images should be overlaid with max bg-black/40 to preserve contrast while allowing imagery to breathe.

image_urls.description: Cinematic couple portrait for hero section
Editorial couple walking in grass for Nasza Historia
Zamek Moszna reception high-end generated view

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use 'lenis' for smooth momentum scrolling (crucial for luxury feel).
Install and use 'framer-motion' for scroll-triggered staggered fade-ups.
Import and use Cormorant Garamond (headings) and Manrope (body) from Google Fonts.
Use pure HTML/Tailwind for structural layout instead of standard Shadcn Card components to avoid the 'SaaS template' look. Use Shadcn primarily for form interactions (RSVP inputs, selects).
All copy/text must be in Polish.
Include a global subtle SVG noise/grain overlay (fixed, z-50, pointer-events-none, mix-blend-overlay, opacity-3) to give an authentic film texture.
Use data-testid on all interactive elements (buttons, inputs) to ensure testability.
Create a countdown timer targeting July 19, 2026.
The QR Section for Kahoot should visually integrate into the luxury dark theme (e.g., wrap it in an elegant bordered glass pane, not just a raw white square).
Avoid standard center-everything templates; use asymmetric bento layouts, staggered imagery, and massive typography.
